phase.title: Strict Handstand Push-up — Phase 1
phase.goal: 1 strict HSPU — owned and repeatable any day of the week
notes: Going for control on every rep — quality over speed.
Cycle the full 4-week microcycle 1–2× before advancing to Phase 2. Don't rush good work; it's not a race.

warmup.name: DB Waiter's Walk
warmup.cue: Single DB locked out overhead; walk under control.

warmup.name: Seated Dumbbell Press
warmup.cue: Challenging weight, but finish all 10 each set.

wod.name: Handstand Push-ups
wod.cue: Scale by elevating feet on a box without cutting range of motion. If you can't do 10 strict HSPU, scale so you can.

accessory.name: Wall Walks
accessory.cue: Face down, feet on wall; climb up until nose and toes touch the wall, walk back down under control.

warmup.name: Handstand Push-up Negatives
warmup.cue: Kick up against the wall, lower as slowly as possible to a tripod position.

wod.name: Inverted Rows (barbell or ring)
wod.cue: Pick a difficulty that allows 10+ reps each round.

accessory.name: Push-ups
accessory.cue: Scale so you can do at least 5 reps per set.

warmup.name: Strict Barbell Press
warmup.cue: Standing strict press out of the rack. Aim for more than 10 reps each set.

wod.name: Handstand Holds
wod.prescription: 3 sets max duration, rest as needed
wod.cue: Hold a strong hollow line upside-down for as long as possible.

accessory.name: Hollow Rocks
accessory.cue: Rock in a hollow the full 20s. Scale to a static hollow hold, lower back flat to the floor.

warmup.name: DB Waiter's Walk
warmup.cue: Single DB locked out overhead; walk under control.

warmup.name: Seated Dumbbell Press
warmup.cue: Heavier than week 1, but still finish all 10.

wod.name: Push Press
wod.cue: Barbell push press; drive a strong hip extension to mimic the kip against the wall.

accessory.name: Wall Walks
accessory.cue: Climb up until nose and toes touch the wall, walk back down under control.

warmup.name: Handstand Push-up Negatives
warmup.cue: Kick up against the wall, lower as slowly as possible to tripod.

wod.name: Strict Pull-ups
wod.cue: Band or assistance if needed so you get ~10 reps each round.

warmup.name: Strict DB Press
warmup.cue: Use ~25% of your best strict press in each hand. Aim for more than 10 reps.

wod.name: DB Waiter's Walks
wod.cue: Challenging DB you can keep locked out overhead for a full minute.

accessory.name: Hollow Rocks
accessory.cue: Rock in a hollow the full 20s; scale to a static hollow hold.

warmup.name: DB Waiter's Walk
warmup.cue: Single DB locked out overhead; walk under control.

wod.name: Handstand Push-ups
wod.cue: Match or beat last week — bigger sets, less scaling.

accessory.name: Wall Walks
accessory.cue: Climb up until nose and toes touch the wall, walk back down under control.

warmup.name: Handstand Push-up Negatives
warmup.cue: Kick up against the wall, lower as slowly as possible to tripod.

wod.name: Inverted Rows (barbell or ring)
wod.cue: Difficulty that allows 10+ reps each round.

warmup.name: Strict Barbell Press
warmup.cue: Standing strict press; aim for more than 10 reps each set.

wod.name: Handstand Holds
wod.cue: Strong hollow line; accumulate more total time than week 1.

accessory.name: Hollow Rocks
accessory.cue: Rock in a hollow the full 20s; scale to a static hollow hold.

warmup.name: DB Waiter's Walk
warmup.cue: Single DB locked out overhead; walk under control.

warmup.name: Seated Dumbbell Press
warmup.cue: Heavier than week 3, but still finish all 10.

wod.name: Handstand Push-ups
wod.cue: Match or beat last week — bigger sets, less scaling.

accessory.name: Push Press
accessory.cue: Strong hip extension to mimic the wall kip.

warmup.name: Handstand Push-up Negatives
warmup.cue: Kick up against the wall, lower as slowly as possible to tripod.

wod.name: Strict Pull-ups
wod.cue: Band or assistance so you get ~10 reps each round.

warmup.name: Handstand Push-ups — retest
warmup.cue: Replicate the Week 1 test exactly. If you scaled then but can now do strict HSPU, do the scaled test first, then a max set of strict HSPU.

wod.name: DB Waiter's Walks
wod.cue: Challenging DB you can keep overhead for a full minute.

accessory.name: Hollow Rocks
accessory.cue: Rock in a hollow the full 20s; scale to a static hollow hold.
